channel.title: Urban Climate Research Digest
channel.description: 都市気候の最新論文（批判的Q&A）と政策・ニュース動向を、日本語でお届けする自動生成ポッドキャスト。
channel.itunes:author: sy4232

item.title: 🎓 論文Q&A｜2026-06-23：LES-Based Optimization of Urban Th ほか2本
item.description: 批判的な質疑応答で読み解く今回の論文： ・[新着] LES-Based Optimization of Urban Thermal Comfort Using Machine Learning ・[新着] Integrating Field Measurements and Simulation Analysis to Evaluate the Influence of Urban Building Configuration on Near-Surface Wind Fields ・[新着] Subambient daytime radiative cooling to mitigate haze-induced amplification of urban heat islands

item.title: 🏛️ 政策ウォッチ｜2026-06-23：Virginia approves 6-year, $28.5B infrast ほか
item.description: 今日の都市気候・政策ウォッチ： ・Virginia approves 6-year, $28.5B infrastructure plan（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・As a Maryland city mulls upzoning, a Realtor association study touts its benefits（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・7 takeaways from Harvard’s 2026 state of housing report（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・Lyft charting a path toward more walkable, connected cities（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News） ・Biking in US cities is getting better, 2026 report says（Smart Cities Dive - Latest News）

item.title: 🎓 論文Q&A｜2026-06-22：A Methodological Framework for Blo ほか2本
item.description: 批判的な質疑応答で読み解く今回の論文： ・[新着] A Methodological Framework for Blockchain-Enabled Peer-to-Peer Solar Trading to Mitigate Urban Heat Islands: A Lagos, Togo Case Study (2021–2026) ・[新着] Development of a PCA-based climatic similarity index to enhance weather file selection criteria for climate-based daylight modelling simulations in tropical climates ・[新着] Urban Greening and Vertical Farming: Sustainable Solutions for Food Security and Climate Resilience in Cities

item.title: 🏛️ 政策ウォッチ｜2026-06-22：Le notti tropicali sono il volto nascost ほか
item.description: 今日の都市気候・政策ウォッチ： ・Le notti tropicali sono il volto nascosto della crisi climatica : perché il caldo non finisce quando tramonta il sole（greenme.it） ・Bihar plans green zones , tree plantation at hospitals for heat reduction（hindustantimes.com） ・Quebec town of Terrasse - Vaudreuil recognizes trees as living beings with rights（cp24.com, kelownadailycourier.ca, medicinehatnews.com, niaga） ・La région Auvergne - Rhône - Alpes en vigilance orange canicule（lyoncapitale.fr, newsday.com, sudouest.fr） ・Şehirlerdeki betonlaşma solunum hastalarını tehdit ediyor（haberyazar.com）

item.title: 🎓 論文Q&A｜2026-06-21：Projected heatwave hazards in an e ほか2本
item.description: 批判的な質疑応答で読み解く今回の論文： ・[新着] Projected heatwave hazards in an eastern Amazonian metropolis under contrasting CMIP6 scenarios ・[新着] Beyond surface area: Integrating volumetric green infrastructure into planning regulations to enhance equity and sustainability in an arid city ・[新着] Sensitivity of convective cloud and rainfall responses to urban aerosol emission strengths

item.title: 🎓 論文Q&A｜2026-06-20：Beyond the riverbank: deep learnin ほか2本
item.description: 批判的な質疑応答で読み解く今回の論文： ・[新着] Beyond the riverbank: deep learning and individual conditional expectation for geospatial assessment of urban river cooling ・[新着] Variations in Vegetation Cooling Efficiency Across 20 Major Cities Worldwide: The Interplay of Built-Up Fraction and Surface Properties ・[新着] Urban thermal inequity: Advancing thermal justice transitions for vulnerable low-income populations
